title: The Dumbest Exploit of 2026?...
summary: Better Stack discusses a security vulnerability in Instagram's AI system that reportedly allowed account takeovers through simple requests. The incident is framed as a notable cybersecurity failure affecting a major social platform.
writeup: Better Stack examines a reported security vulnerability in Instagram's AI system that allegedly enabled account takeovers through simple requests. The video frames the incident as a notable cybersecurity failure on a major social platform. The takeaway centers on how an AI feature became an account takeover vector and what that signals about security gaps in AI systems deployed at scale.
